title: Add CRM Analytics as a New Report Type
story: As a Salesforce administrator, I want to see CRM Analytics dashboards and reports alongside standard Salesforce Reports, Dashboards, Pulse, and Tableau assets, so that all my analytics assets are documented in one place.
description:
Adds Salesforce CRM Analytics (CRMA) as a new report/dashboard type in DataTools Pro. CRMA is a separate Salesforce product with its own analytics asset repository.

The implementation fetches CRMA dashboards from the Salesforce Wave API endpoint (/services/data/v58.0/wave/dashboards) and integrates them into:
- The Reports & Dashboards page with a CRMA type filter
- The Metrics analytics tab so CRMA assets can be related to metrics with a distinguishing icon
acceptance_criteria: CRM Analytics appears as a report type option alongside Reports, Dashboards, Pulse, and Tableau
CRMA dashboards are fetched from the Salesforce Wave API
CRMA assets display on the Reports & Dashboards page
CRMA assets can be linked to metrics on the analytics tab with a CRMA icon
ux_changes: CRMA type added to report type filter. CRMA icon displayed alongside CRMA assets on Reports & Dashboards page and Metrics analytics tab.
middleware_changes: New fetch routine to pull CRMA dashboards from the Salesforce Wave API endpoint.
data_model_changes: New report type value for CRM Analytics assets.
api_changes: Salesforce Wave API integration: /services/data/v58.0/wave/dashboards to retrieve CRM Analytics dashboards.
implementation_notes: Developer researched CRMA via Trailhead and confirmed Wave API endpoint returns dashboard list. Implemented on both the reports/dashboards page and metrics analytics tabs.
comment_summary: Developer learned CRMA basics via Trailhead, confirmed Wave API endpoint works via Salesforce Workbench. Implemented and pushed to development for review.
